productDisplayName: Scullers For Her Women's Wow Knit Red Top
description: CompositionRed top in 100% cotton with a round ribbed neckline with gathers on the front, mildly puffed sleeves with snipped edges and a ribbed hemline, back neck panel with gathers and stone embellishments above the left hemFitting SlimWash carePre-soak the garment before washWash inside out with zippers and buttons fastenedPreferably hand washedUse only mild detergentsWash dark colours separatelyDo not attempt to remove stains by spot washingDrip dry on hanger and avoid wringingFlat dryPreferably steam ironGet ready for the monsoon in this feminine top from scullers. The ruffled neckline and puffed sleeves give it a dainty look. This top looks great when teamed with a simple white skirt and ballerina flats for a day out with friends.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.7", Chest-33", Waist-26"
